overall.description: A first-person walk along a rain-soaked highway in a desolate, industrial landscape from the game Death Stranding. The camera moves steadily past a large 'BRIDGES' billboard, blue storage barrels, and metal guardrails while heavy rain creates a moody, atmospheric environment with reduced visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked highway with advertising billboard and red shoulder pavement

events.description: large BRIDGES billboard passes out of view to the left
blue industrial barrels come into view on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right shoulder of the wet highway toward distant mountains

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with BRIDGES logo and figure image, mounted on metal scaffolding
rain-soaked black asphalt highway with puddles and reflective surface
red-colored paved shoulder area alongside the main asphalt road
hazy mountain range visible through the rain in the background
tall street light pole with fixture extending over the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a large BRIDGES billboard on the left side of a rain-soaked highway. The camera walks forward along the wet asphalt, passing the billboard as it exits left. Blue industrial barrels appear on the right side as the camera approaches, with distant mountains visible through the hazy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with metal guardrail and industrial containers

events.description: passing blue barrels and yellow utility structure on the right
yellow structure and blue barrels pass out of view behind camera

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway past industrial containers and parallel guardrail

entered.detail: cluster of blue industrial barrels with orange hazard symbols, some lying on their sides
large yellow rectangular industrial container or equipment box
long silver metal guardrail running parallel to the road on the right side
ruined arch-like bridge or industrial structure visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past blue industrial barrels and a yellow utility structure positioned on the right shoulder. A continuous metal guardrail runs parallel to the road, becoming more prominent as the camera passes the containers. The landscape remains open with sparse vegetation and distant ruins visible through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway approaching overhead sign gantry

events.description: large overhead highway sign gantry enters view from the right
camera passes underneath the overhead sign structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the endless highway toward the overhead sign structure

entered.detail: large metal overhead highway sign structure with curved support poles

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a long stretch of highway dominated by the continuous metal guardrail on the right. An overhead highway sign gantry gradually approaches from the distance, entering the frame from the right and eventually passing overhead. The landscape remains desolate and rain-soaked with sparse vegetation along the roadside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked highway that transitions from a branded industrial waypoint into a desolate, open stretch of road. It begins by passing a large BRIDGES billboard on the left, moving across wet asphalt as distant mountains emerge through the hazy rain. As the camera advances, the view shifts toward the right shoulder, gliding past blue industrial barrels and a yellow utility structure. The scene then opens up along a long stretch of highway dominated by a continuous metal guardrail and sparse roadside vegetation. Finally, the camera approaches a distant overhead highway sign gantry that gradually enters the frame and passes overhead amidst the persistent downpour.
